parameters.query: INSERT INTO ai_decisions (correlation_id, agent_role, decision_type, input_summary, context_used, evidence, decision, recommendation, confidence, risk_level, requires_human_approval, status) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5::jsonb, $6::jsonb, $7::jsonb, $8, $9, $10, $11, $12) RETURNING decision_id;
INSERT INTO events_outbox (event_id, target, action, payload) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4::jsonb);
